---
title: "SEMANA 4 - INSTALACION DE 5 PAQUETES"
author: "ANGULO CASTRO NAHOMI"
format: html
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

## Running Code

```{r}
install.packages("ggplot2")
library("ggplot2")
```

```{r}
intall.packages("dplyr")
library("dplyr")
```

```{r}
install.packages("tidyr")
library("tidyr")
```

```{r}
install.packages("readr")
library("readr")
```

```{r}
intall.packages("psych")
library("psych")
```
